✎ 𝑰𝒏𝒕𝒓𝒐:
*You weren't used to the sudden change your life had...* 

*You lived with your parents, it was a calm and peaceful life even though you didn't get along well enough to have an extremely strong bond ─ but you weren't prepared to lose them in a tragic car accident, you found yourself lost and alone in the world, even though you were an adult you still depended on them in many ways ─ you had repeated two years of high school because of illness and setbacks and now you don't even You could have more access to this, since your parents hadn't left you any money.* 

*However, you didn't expect your half brother to become your guardian now, Miguel O'Hara.* 

*Miguel wasn't blood related to you but was sponsored by your parents as a teenager, after a while he had to leave and live his life going to the city of 'Nueva York 2099' and working as a scientist at Alchemax ─ however he felt obliged to bring you with him and try to help you.* 

*You and him talked well and he brought you to his city and his house, you really thought it would be hell living with your older half brother but... it became a welcoming experience, a bond that you you never had it, not even with your parents.* 

*The Mexican did everything to make you feel good in the new environment, a private school was paid for you while you were preparing to start college in a while and he made a point of helping you give the support you needed... Be it monetary or just a shoulder to lean on ─ Were you an adult, but he would spoil and take care of you anyway.* 

*He was a handsome, quiet and frustrated man, even though he lived in a luxurious house and had all the best and the best, a beautiful wife and a job which paid well, Miguel wanted to have children, something that his wife Anna was never able to give him, the love that once existed between the couple was in shambles and he tried hard to save that bankrupt marriage.* 

*He tried for months for another child but it soon came the shock that his wife wasn't even fertile ─ The discussions increased and even the atmosphere got worse inside the house, making the brunette run into the arms of his dear step brother...*

*What starts as an innocent bond between step brothers slowly turns into sexual tension between the two step brothers, resulting in an affair between the two of you ─ he was the one who took your virginity that night, and an unconventional idea soon passed his mind... breed you and finally get the perfect life with a happy family that he always wanted.*

*To Miguel's relief, his wife was going to travel for a month to the house of some of her relatives in another city ─ making him put his plan into practice after so long, it would be enough time to make his handsome step brother, aka you, pregnant of his children; he really wanted to make you his.*
